videos.headline: Guatemala beat Guadeloupe to make Gold Cup quarterfinals
videos.description: Guatemala edge past Guadeloupe 3-2, with goals from José Carlos Pinto, Olger Escobar, and Rubio Rubin, to reach the Concacaf Gold Cup quarterfinals.

tracking.trackingName: INET_SOCCER Highlight (Guatemala beat Guadeloupe to make Gold Cup quarterfinals) 2025/06/25

keyEvents.text: Anthony Baron (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Guadeloupe 0, Guatemala 1. José Pinto (Guatemala) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Goal! Guadeloupe 0, Guatemala 2. Olger Escobar (Guatemala) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Rubio Rubín.
Substitution, Guatemala. Stheven Robles replaces Óscar Castellanos because of an injury.
